# kaleido_platform_connector_standard_api (Resource)

Deploys a standard API from a connector service's embedded definitions, binding subflow types to deployed connector flows.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) Environment ID
- `flow_type_bindings` (Map of String) Map of subflow binding name to deployed connector-flow name. Keys are taken from the standard API's subflowBindingTypes (e.g. resolve, submit, query).
- `name` (String) Standard API template name (e.g. evm, bitcoin)
- `service` (String) Connector service ID

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description override.

### Read-Only

- `current_version` (String) The currently deployed template version.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
